text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon and I are heading back home
when she pipes up with a question.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you recall our last attempt to create a
"precious" memory?
choice_data_list: Oh, you mean that game of tag?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. That operation was unsuccessful. The only
thing we seemed to accumulate was your fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I would like you to instruct me on how
to make memories, if possible.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The number of methods I can simulate is limited. I
have determined that I will be unable to provide
worthwhile suggestions.

I was already planning to makes some
suggestions, but...

Come to think of it, Mihono Bourbon has a knack
for breaking machines just by touching them.

If we can overcome that issue together, maybe it
will become a precious memory for her.
choice_data_list:
How about we try some special training that will
help you to use machines?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Will learning to use machines result in a
"precious" memory?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am still unable to comprehend what makes a
memory "precious," but I am willing to go along
with your suggestions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I look forward to making memories with you.

A few days later, we start Mihono Bourbon's
special training.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
An electric kettle that can only bring water to a
lukewarm temperature, a cracked monitor, an
electric fan that only spins slowly...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. If it's an item that's going to
be thrown away, I can touch it without hesitation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
An objective has been created—touch machines
without breaking them.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Now... Commencing operation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: First, the electric kettle...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Serious damage detected. Complete breakdown
of device confirmed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Next, the monitor...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Serious damage detected. Complete breakdown
of device confirmed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: The electric fan...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Serious damage detected. Complete breakdown
of device confirmed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Calculator. Blender. Video game console...

One after the other, they all seemingly break the
moment she turns them on.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: The last one... A smartphone...

I gulp as soon as I realize what device she's
reaching for.

It's my work phone! I carelessly left it lying near
the machines we're using for this special training!

It's my work phone! I carelessly left it lying near
the machines we're using for this special training!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have determined that this smartphone is your
personal device. Suspending training.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
There are no more devices to test. Is training
over?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Unfortunately.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I can see that you're disappointed. According to
my analysis, it's a logical reaction.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing... Just, there's something on your
cheek.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you got some dust on your face while
cleaning up all the broken devices.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
All machines have been destroyed. I have failed
our objective of safely handling them...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But, after observing your actions, I detected
some useful information in my memory logs.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Therefore, I believe next time will be a success.

Saying nothing more, Mihono Bourbon wipes my
cheek clean.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Order acknowledged. Proceeding with cau—oh.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Is this smartphone your personal device?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. I realized too late and touched it
with my fingertips. May I ask you to confirm
whether it remains operable?

I gently pick up the phone. I'm sure I left it on
earlier, but now the screen is black.
Looks like it won't turn on anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I've determined that this situation will disrupt
your work. We must have it repaired at once.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Um... I'm truly sorry about this.

I try to comfort her by saying that I had the
chance to stop her if I wanted, but she simply
stares at me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing... Just, there's something on your
cheek.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you got some dust on your face while
cleaning up all the broken devices.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
All machines have been destroyed. I have failed
our objective of safely handling them...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But, after observing your actions, I detected
some useful information in my memory logs.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Therefore, I believe next time will be a success.

Saying nothing more, Mihono Bourbon wipes my
cheek clean.
